meaning: n.吸毒者adj.质量低劣的,无价值的
examples: Stop digesting news. Are you a news junky?
I was basically a media junky and still am.
The possible culprits: food additives and junky diets.
Power quality ratings are now in the top half, belying the image of junky Korean cars.
Power quality ratings put Hyundai solidly in the top half, which belies the image of junky Korean cars.
